changeSet.author: trainingsplan
changeSet.sql: UPDATE trainings t JOIN ( SELECT training_plan_id, MAX(training_date) AS max_date FROM trainings WHERE training_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY training_plan_id ) m ON t.training_plan_id = m.training_plan_id SET t.week_number = FLOOR(DATEDIFF(m.max_date, t.training_date) / 7) + 1, t.day_of_week = CASE DAYOFWEEK(t.training_date) WHEN 1 THEN 'SUNDAY' WHEN 2 THEN 'MONDAY' WHEN 3 THEN 'TUESDAY' WHEN 4 THEN 'WEDNESDAY' WHEN 5 THEN 'THURSDAY' WHEN 6 THEN 'FRIDAY' WHEN 7 THEN 'SATURDAY' END WHERE t.training_date IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE trainings SET week_number = 1, day_of_week = 'MONDAY' WHERE week_number IS NULL OR day_of_week IS NULL;
